'''Topa''' was a mineral-poor [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Sespe system/Legends|Sespe system]] of the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]], [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by [[Torega]]. [[Shadowport/Legends|Shadowports]] on Topa served local [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] groups.
{{Planet-stub}}
